justification: Senator Moran's official press release explicitly names him as Chair of the Senate Commerce Subcommittee on Aviation, Space, and Innovation.
SCSP's official page for Ylli Bajraktari explicitly identifies him as President & CEO of the Special Competitive Studies Project.
SCSP's official 'Who We Are' page lists Eric Schmidt as Chair of the Special Competitive Studies Project alongside other leadership.
University of Utah's official announcement names Manish Parashar as inaugural Chief AI Officer and Director of the SCI Institute.
Université de Montréal's Department of Computer Science and Operations Research (DIRO) directory explicitly lists Yoshua Bengio as a full professor.
Mila's official leadership page lists Valérie Pisano as President and CEO of the Quebec Artificial Intelligence Institute.
Bloomberg article explicitly names Ian Goodfellow as 'Former Apple Director of Machine Learning' confirming the employer relationship.
IASEAI's official conference page for Stuart Russell confirms his role as President of the International Association for Safe and Ethical AI.
Wikipedia article on IASEAI explicitly names Mark Nitzberg as Interim Executive Director, Secretary-Treasurer, and Board Member.
News article explicitly names Marsha Blackburn as one of five Vice Chairs of the NRSC under Chair Tim Scott.
NPR article on NRSC's AI-generated ad quotes Joanna Rodriguez by name as NRSC communications director defending the ad.
TechCrunch article confirms Sam Altman's board chairmanship at Helion Energy and his subsequent departure from the board.
Stanford CIS page documents Lessig as a professor at Stanford Law School and founder of the Center for Internet and Society.
Niskanen Center author page for Jennifer Pahlka confirms her role as a senior fellow publishing work through the organization.
Federation of American Scientists expert page for Jennifer Pahlka explicitly lists her as a senior fellow at FAS.
